listings_table.day_price_row_label: {n, plural, one {# day price} other {# days price}}
listings_table.day_prices_help: Set a price for each number of days you want to offer. Leave a row blank to not offer that length. The maximum matches the Booking Duration (days) above — increase it and save to add more rows.
listings_table.no_email_attendees: No attendees have an email address
listings_table.yes_id_verification_requi: Yes — ID verification required at entry
listings_table.yes_not_shown_in_public_l: Yes — not shown in public listings list
listings_table.listing_deactivated_warni: This listing is deactivated and cannot be booked
listings_table.creating_new_listing_base: Creating a new listing based on {name}.
listings_table.delete_warning_text: This permanently deletes the listing and its activity log entries. Its {count} attendee(s) will be unlinked from this listing rather than deleted — their attendee records and any payments are kept, and any bookings they have on other listings are unaffected.
listings_table.delete_confirmation_text: To delete this listing, type its name "{name}" into the box below:
listings_table.deactivate_effect_404: Return a 404 error on the public ticket page
listings_table.existing_attendees_not_af: Existing attendees will not be affected.
listings_table.deactivate_confirmation_t: To deactivate this listing, type its name "{name}" into the box below:
listings_table.reactivate_will_make_avai: Reactivating this listing will make it available for registrations again.
listings_table.public_page_accessible_ne: The public ticket page will be accessible and new attendees can register.
listings_table.reactivate_confirmation_t: To reactivate this listing, type its name "{name}" into the box below:
listings_table.running_totals_note: These are running totals; edit them for imports or corrections. Total Attendees Ever affects standard and purchase-page availability. Accuracy is not guaranteed.
listings_table.running_totals_error_expl: Expected values come from attendee rows. Got values are the stored running totals used by standard listing availability. Normal attendee changes keep these aligned; recalculate the stored totals before relying on capacity or reporting.
listings_table.running_totals_error_titl: Listing running totals do not match attendee rows.
listings_table.recalculate_choose: Choose at least one total to recalculate
listings_table.adjust_income_warning: This posts a correcting entry to the money ledger — the source of truth for income. Corrections are appended, never destructive: the difference from the current figure is recorded as a write-off adjustment. It does not change any booking's payment.
listings_table.income_ledger_recognised_: Recognised income is the figure reported above and in exports; it is refund-agnostic. The net balance is the live balance of this listing's revenue account, which also nets refunds — so the two reconcile here.
listings_table.duration_warning_message: Changing booking duration will update existing bookings for this listing.
listings_table.recalculate_description: Compare the stored listing totals with totals counted from attendee records. Select only the stored values you want to replace.
